name: runesmith-aiops
description: [RuneSmith] Populates an AI Operations Confluence space from six template pages (Quick Start, Full Integration, Architecture, Best Practices, FAQ, Reference). All canonical tokens ({COMPANY}, {SITE}, {SPACE_KEY}, {PROJECT_KEY}, etc.) are substituted at publish time so the same templates work for any tenant. Space must already exist in Confluence — skill is a one-shot populator.
